sEn: ADD enables single-step real-time image synthesis with foundation models, outperforming GANs and LCMs in one step and matching SDXL in four steps.
sZh: ADD 实现了基于基础模型的单步实时图像合成，一步超越 GAN 和 LCM，四步达到 SDXL 水平。
absEn: We introduce Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD), a novel training approach that efficiently samples large-scale foundational image diffusion models in just 1-4 steps while maintaining high image quality. We use score distillation to leverage large-scale off-the-shelf image diffusion models as a teacher signal in combination with an adversarial loss to ensure high image fidelity even in the low-step regime of one or two sampling steps. Our analyses show that our model clearly outperforms existing few-step methods (GANs, Latent Consistency Models) in a single step and reaches the performance of state-of-the-art diffusion models (SDXL) in only four steps. ADD is the first method to unlock single-step, real-time image synthesis with foundation models. Code and weights available under https://github.com/Stability-AI/generative-models and https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/ .
absZh: 我们提出了对抗性扩散蒸馏（ADD），一种新颖的训练方法，能够仅用1-4步高效采样大规模基础图像扩散模型，同时保持高图像质量。我们利用分数蒸馏，将大规模现成图像扩散模型作为教师信号，并结合对抗性损失，确保即使在一步或两步的低步数情况下也能保持高图像保真度。我们的分析表明，我们的模型在单步中明显优于现有的少步方法（GAN、潜在一致性模型），并在仅四步中达到最先进扩散模型（SDXL）的性能。ADD 是首个解锁基于基础模型的单步实时图像合成的方法。代码和权重可在 https://github.com/Stability-AI/generative-models 和 https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/ 获取。

contrib.en: Introduces Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD), a method for 1-4 step sampling of foundational image diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 提出对抗扩散蒸馏（ADD），一种仅需1-4步即可采样基础图像扩散模型的方法。

contrib.en: Combines adversarial loss and score distillation to achieve high fidelity in few-step generation.
contrib.zh: 结合对抗损失和分数蒸馏，在少步生成中实现高保真度。

contrib.en: ADD-XL outperforms teacher SDXL in 4 steps and LCM-XL in 1 step, per user studies.
contrib.zh: 根据用户研究，ADD-XL在4步时超越教师模型SDXL，在1步时超越LCM-XL。

contrib.en: First method to enable single-step real-time image synthesis with foundation models.
contrib.zh: 首个实现基础模型单步实时图像合成的方法。

contrib.en: Ablation studies show importance of pretrained student, discriminator conditioning, and loss combination.
contrib.zh: 消融研究表明预训练学生模型、判别器条件设置和损失组合的重要性。

contrib.en: Retains iterative refinement capability, unlike pure GAN approaches.
contrib.zh: 保留迭代优化能力，不同于纯GAN方法。

limits.en: Requires pretrained diffusion model as teacher and student initialization.
limits.zh: 需要预训练扩散模型作为教师和学生初始化。

limits.en: Adversarial training may introduce instability and requires careful tuning.
limits.zh: 对抗训练可能引入不稳定性，需要仔细调参。

limits.en: Enhanced realism at cost of slightly decreased sample diversity.
limits.zh: 增强的真实感以略微降低样本多样性为代价。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 512x512 resolution; higher resolutions not tested.
limits.zh: 评估限于512x512分辨率；未测试更高分辨率。

limits.en: Performance depends on choice of weighting schedule for distillation loss.
limits.zh: 性能依赖于蒸馏损失的权重调度选择。

items.en: We introduce Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD), a novel training approach that efficiently samples large-scale foundational image diffusion models in just 1–4 steps while maintaining high image quality. We use score distillation to leverage large-scale off-the-shelf image diffusion models as a teacher signal in combination with an adversarial loss to ensure high image fidelity even in the low-step regime of one or two sampling steps. Our analyses show that our model clearly outperforms existing few-step methods (GANs, Latent Consistency Models) in a single step and reaches the performance of state-of-the-art diffusion models (SDXL) in only four steps. ADD is the first method to unlock single-step, real-time image synthesis with foundation models.
items.zh: 我们提出了对抗性扩散蒸馏（ADD），一种新颖的训练方法，能够在仅1-4步内高效采样大规模基础图像扩散模型，同时保持高图像质量。我们使用分数蒸馏来利用大规模现成图像扩散模型作为教师信号，并结合对抗性损失，以确保即使在一步或两步采样的低步数情况下也能实现高图像保真度。我们的分析表明，我们的模型在单步中明显优于现有的少步方法（GAN、潜在一致性模型），并在仅四步中达到最先进扩散模型（SDXL）的性能。ADD是首个实现基础模型单步实时图像合成的方法。

items.en: Diffusion models (DMs) [20, 63, 65] have taken a central role in the field of generative modeling and have recently enabled remarkable advances in high-quality image- [53, 54, 3] and video- [21, 4, 12] synthesis. One of the key strengths of DMs is their scalability and iterative nature, which allows them to handle complex tasks such as image synthesis from free-form text prompts. However, the iterative inference process in DMs requires a significant number of sampling steps, which currently hinders their real-time application. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) [14, 26, 27], on the other hand, are characterized by their single-step formulation and inherent speed. But despite attempts to scale to large datasets[58, 25], GANs often fall short of DMs in terms of sample quality. The aim of this work is to combine the superior sample quality of DMs with the inherent speed of GANs.
items.zh: 扩散模型（DM）[20, 63, 65]在生成建模领域占据了核心地位，并最近在高质量图像[53, 54, 3]和视频[21, 4, 12]合成方面取得了显著进展。DM的关键优势之一是其可扩展性和迭代性质，这使得它们能够处理诸如从自由形式文本提示合成图像等复杂任务。然而，DM中的迭代推理过程需要大量的采样步骤，这目前阻碍了其实时应用。另一方面，生成对抗网络（GAN）[14, 26, 27]以其单步公式和固有速度而著称。但尽管尝试扩展到大型数据集[58, 25]，GAN在样本质量上通常不如DM。本工作的目标是结合DM的优越样本质量与GAN的固有速度。

items.en: Our approach is conceptually simple: We propose Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD), a general approach that reduces the number of inference steps of a pre-trained diffusion model to 1–4 sampling steps while maintaining high sampling fidelity and potentially further improving the overall performance of the model. To this end, we introduce a combination of two training objectives: (i) an adversarial loss and (ii) a distillation loss that corresponds to score distillation sampling (SDS) [51]. The adversarial loss forces the model to directly generate samples that lie on the manifold of real images at each forward pass, avoiding blurriness and other artifacts typically observed in other distillation methods [43]. The distillation loss uses another pretrained (and fixed) DM as a teacher to effectively utilize the extensive knowledge of the pretrained DM and preserve the strong compositionality observed in large DMs. During inference, our approach does not use classifier-free guidance [19], further reducing memory requirements. We retain the model’s ability to improve results through iterative refinement, which is an advantage over previous one-step GAN-based approaches [59].
items.zh: 我们的方法在概念上很简单：我们提出对抗性扩散蒸馏（ADD），一种通用方法，将预训练扩散模型的推理步骤减少到1-4个采样步骤，同时保持高采样保真度，并可能进一步提高模型的整体性能。为此，我们引入了两个训练目标的组合：（i）对抗性损失和（ii）对应于分数蒸馏采样（SDS）[51]的蒸馏损失。对抗性损失迫使模型在每次前向传播中直接生成位于真实图像流形上的样本，避免了其他蒸馏方法中常见的模糊和其他伪影[43]。蒸馏损失使用另一个预训练（且固定）的DM作为教师，以有效利用预训练DM的广泛知识，并保持大型DM中观察到的强组合性。在推理过程中，我们的方法不使用无分类器引导[19]，进一步减少了内存需求。我们保留了模型通过迭代细化改进结果的能力，这是相对于先前基于GAN的单步方法[59]的优势。

items.en: Our contributions can be summarized as follows:
items.zh: 我们的贡献可总结如下：

items.en: We introduce ADD, a method for turning pretrained diffusion models into high-fidelity, real-time image generators using only 1–4 sampling steps.
items.zh: 我们引入了ADD，一种将预训练扩散模型转化为高保真、实时图像生成器的方法，仅需1-4个采样步骤。

items.en: Our method uses a novel combination of adversarial training and score distillation, for which we carefully ablate several design choices.
items.zh: 我们的方法使用了对抗性训练和分数蒸馏的新颖组合，为此我们仔细消融了几种设计选择。

items.en: ADD significantly outperforms strong baselines such as LCM, LCM-XL [38] and single-step GANs [59], and is able to handle complex image compositions while maintaining high image realism at only a single inference step.
items.zh: ADD明显优于强基线，如LCM、LCM-XL [38]和单步GAN [59]，并且能够在仅一个推理步骤中处理复杂的图像构图，同时保持高图像真实感。

items.en: Using four sampling steps, ADD-XL outperforms its teacher model SDXL-Base at a resolution of 5122superscript5122512^{2} px.
items.zh: 使用四个采样步骤，ADD-XL在512^2像素分辨率下优于其教师模型SDXL-Base。

items.en: While diffusion models achieve remarkable performance in synthesizing and editing high-resolution images [53, 54, 3] and videos [21, 4], their iterative nature hinders real-time application. Latent diffusion models [54] attempt to solve this problem by representing images in a more computationally feasible latent space [11], but they still rely on the iterative application of large models with billions of parameters.
items.zh: 虽然扩散模型在合成和编辑高分辨率图像[53, 54, 3]和视频[21, 4]方面取得了显著性能，但其迭代性质阻碍了实时应用。潜在扩散模型[54]试图通过将图像表示在计算上更可行的潜在空间[11]中来解决这个问题，但它们仍然依赖于具有数十亿参数的大型模型的迭代应用。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Adversarial Diffusion Distillation. The ADD-student is trained as a denoiser that receives diffused input images xssubscript𝑥𝑠x_{s} and outputs samples x^θ​(xs,s)subscript^𝑥𝜃subscript𝑥𝑠𝑠\hat{x}_{\theta}(x_{s},s) and optimizes two objectives: a) adversarial loss: the model aims to fool a discriminator which is trained to distinguish the generated samples x^θsubscript^𝑥𝜃\hat{x}_{\theta} from real images x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}. b) distillation loss: the model is trained to match the denoised targets x^ψsubscript^𝑥𝜓\hat{x}_{\psi} of a frozen DM teacher.
items.capZh: 图2：对抗性扩散蒸馏。ADD学生模型被训练为一个去噪器，接收扩散输入图像x_s并输出样本x̂_θ(x_s, s)，并优化两个目标：a) 对抗性损失：模型旨在欺骗一个判别器，该判别器被训练来区分生成的样本x̂_θ与真实图像x_0。b) 蒸馏损失：模型被训练来匹配冻结的DM教师模型的去噪目标x̂_ψ。

items.en: In addition to utilizing faster samplers for diffusion models [64, 37, 8, 74], there is a growing body of research on model distillation such as progressive distillation [56] and guidance distillation [43]. These approaches reduce the number of iterative sampling steps to 4-8, but may significantly lower the original performance. Furthermore, they require an iterative training process. Consistency models [66] address the latter issue by enforcing a consistency regularization on the ODE trajectory and demonstrate strong performance for pixel-based models in the few-shot setting. LCMs [38] focus on distilling latent diffusion models and achieve impressive performance at 4 sampling steps. Recently, LCM-LoRA [40] introduced a low-rank adaptation [22] training for efficiently learning LCM modules, which can be plugged into different checkpoints for SD and SDXL [54, 50]. InstaFlow [36] propose to use Rectified Flows [35] to facilitate a better distillation process.
items.zh: 除了利用更快的扩散模型采样器[64, 37, 8, 74]之外，还有越来越多的关于模型蒸馏的研究，如渐进蒸馏[56]和引导蒸馏[43]。这些方法将迭代采样步骤减少到4-8步，但可能会显著降低原始性能。此外，它们需要迭代训练过程。一致性模型[66]通过强制ODE轨迹上的一致性正则化来解决后一个问题，并在少样本设置中展示了像素级模型的强大性能。LCM [38]专注于蒸馏潜在扩散模型，并在4个采样步骤中实现了令人印象深刻的性能。最近，LCM-LoRA [40]引入了一种低秩适应[22]训练，用于高效学习LCM模块，这些模块可以插入到SD和SDXL的不同检查点中[54, 50]。InstaFlow [36]提出使用整流流[35]来促进更好的蒸馏过程。

items.en: All of these methods share common flaws: samples synthesized in four steps often look blurry and exhibit noticeable artifacts. At fewer sampling steps, this problem is further amplified. GANs [14] can also be trained as standalone single-step models for text-to-image synthesis [59, 25]. Their sampling speed is impressive, yet the performance lags behind diffusion-based models. In part, this can be attributed to the finely balanced GAN-specific architectures necessary for stable training of the adversarial objective. Scaling these models and integrating advances in neural network architectures without disturbing the balance is notoriously challenging. Additionally, current state-of-the-art text-to-image GANs do not have a method like classifier-free guidance available which is crucial for DMs at scale.
items.zh: 所有这些方法都有共同的缺陷：在四步中合成的样本通常看起来模糊并出现明显的伪影。在更少的采样步骤下，这个问题进一步放大。GAN [14]也可以作为独立的单步模型进行文本到图像合成[59, 25]。它们的采样速度令人印象深刻，但性能落后于基于扩散的模型。部分原因可以归因于稳定训练对抗性目标所需的精细平衡的GAN特定架构。在不破坏平衡的情况下扩展这些模型并整合神经网络架构的进步是出了名的困难。此外，当前最先进的文本到图像GAN没有像无分类器引导这样的方法，而这对于大规模DM至关重要。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Qualitative comparison to state-of-the-art fast samplers. Single step samples from our ADD-XL (top) and LCM-XL [40], our custom StyleGAN-T [59] baseline, InstaFlow [36] and MUSE. For MUSE, we use the OpenMUSE implementation and default inference settings with 16 sampling steps. For LCM-XL, we sample with 1, 2 and 4 steps. Our model outperforms all other few-step samplers in a single step.
items.capZh: 图3：与最先进快速采样器的定性比较。来自我们的ADD-XL（顶部）和LCM-XL [40]、我们的自定义StyleGAN-T [59]基线、InstaFlow [36]和MUSE的单步样本。对于MUSE，我们使用OpenMUSE实现和默认推理设置，16个采样步骤。对于LCM-XL，我们使用1、2和4步采样。我们的模型在单步中优于所有其他少步采样器。

items.en: Score Distillation Sampling [51] also known as Score Jacobian Chaining [68] is a recently proposed method that has been developed to distill the knowledge of foundational T2I Models into 3D synthesis models. While the majority of SDS-based works [51, 68, 69, 45] use SDS in the context of per-scene optimization for 3D objects, the approach has also been applied to text-to-3D-video-synthesis [62] and in the context of image editing [16].
items.zh: 分数蒸馏采样[51]也称为分数雅可比链[68]，是最近提出的一种方法，用于将基础T2I模型的知识蒸馏到3D合成模型中。虽然大多数基于SDS的工作[51, 68, 69, 45]将SDS用于3D对象的每场景优化，但该方法也已应用于文本到3D视频合成[62]和图像编辑[16]的上下文中。

items.en: Recently, the authors of [13] have shown a strong relationship between score-based models and GANs and propose Score GANs, which are trained using score-based diffusion flows from a DM instead of a discriminator. Similarly, Diff-Instruct [42], a method which generalizes SDS, enables to distill a pretrained diffusion model into a generator without discriminator.
items.zh: 最近，[13]的作者展示了基于分数的模型与GAN之间的强关系，并提出了分数GAN，它使用来自DM的基于分数的扩散流而不是判别器进行训练。类似地，Diff-Instruct [42]是一种泛化SDS的方法，使得能够将预训练扩散模型蒸馏为生成器而无需判别器。

items.en: Conversely, there are also approaches which aim to improve the diffusion process using adversarial training. For faster sampling, Denoising Diffusion GANs [70] are introduced as a method to enable sampling with few steps. To improve quality, a discriminator loss is added to the score matching objective in Adversarial Score Matching [24] and the consistency objective of CTM [29].
items.zh: 相反，也有方法旨在使用对抗性训练来改进扩散过程。为了更快采样，引入了去噪扩散GAN [70]作为一种能够以少步采样的方法。为了提高质量，在对抗性分数匹配[24]和CTM [29]的一致性目标中，将判别器损失添加到分数匹配目标中。

items.en: Our method combines adversarial training and score distillation in a hybrid objective to address the issues in current top performing few-step generative models.
items.zh: 我们的方法将对抗性训练和分数蒸馏结合在一个混合目标中，以解决当前顶级少步生成模型中的问题。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Qualitative effect of sampling steps. We show qualitative examples when sampling ADD-XL with 1, 2, and 4 steps. Single-step samples are often already of high quality, but increasing the number of steps can further improve the consistency (e.g. second prompt, first column) and attention to detail (e.g. second prompt, second column). The seeds are constant within columns and we see that the general layout is preserved across sampling steps, allowing for fast exploration of outputs while retaining the possibility to refine.
items.capZh: 图4：采样步骤的定性效果。我们展示了使用1、2和4步采样ADD-XL时的定性示例。单步样本通常已经具有高质量，但增加步数可以进一步提高一致性（例如，第二个提示，第一列）和对细节的关注（例如，第二个提示，第二列）。种子在列内保持不变，我们看到总体布局在采样步骤中得以保留，允许快速探索输出，同时保留细化的可能性。

items.en: Our goal is to generate high-fidelity samples in as few sampling steps as possible, while matching the quality of state-of-the-art models [50, 53, 55, 7]. The adversarial objective [14, 60] naturally lends itself to fast generation as it trains a model that outputs samples on the image manifold in a single forward step. However, attempts at scaling GANs to large datasets [59, 58] observed that is critical to not solely rely on the discriminator, but also employ a pretrained classifier or CLIP network for improving text alignment. As remarked in [59], overly utilizing discriminative networks introduces artifacts and image quality suffers. Instead, we utilize the gradient of a pretrained diffusion model via a score distillation objective to improve text alignment and sample quality. Furthermore, instead of training from scratch, we initialize our model with pretrained diffusion model weights; pretraining the generator network is known to significantly improve training with an adversarial loss [15]. Lastly, instead of utilizing a decoder-only architecture used for GAN training [26, 27], we adapt a standard diffusion model framework. This setup naturally enables iterative refinement.
items.zh: 我们的目标是在尽可能少的采样步骤中生成高保真样本，同时匹配最先进模型[50, 53, 55, 7]的质量。对抗性目标[14, 60]自然适合快速生成，因为它训练一个在单次前向步骤中输出图像流形上样本的模型。然而，将GAN扩展到大型数据集[59, 58]的尝试观察到，关键不仅依赖于判别器，还要使用预训练分类器或CLIP网络来改善文本对齐。如[59]所述，过度利用判别网络会引入伪影，图像质量受损。相反，我们通过分数蒸馏目标利用预训练扩散模型的梯度来改善文本对齐和样本质量。此外，我们不是从头开始训练，而是用预训练扩散模型权重初始化我们的模型；预训练生成器网络已知能显著改善对抗性损失训练[15]。最后，我们不是使用用于GAN训练的仅解码器架构[26, 27]，而是采用标准扩散模型框架。这种设置自然支持迭代细化。

items.en: Our training procedure is outlined in Fig. 2 and involves three networks: The ADD-student is initialized from a pretrained UNet-DM with weights θ𝜃\theta, a discriminator with trainable weights ϕitalic-ϕ\phi, and a DM teacher with frozen weights ψ𝜓\psi. During training, the ADD-student generates samples x^θ​(xs,s)subscript^𝑥𝜃subscript𝑥𝑠𝑠\hat{x}_{\theta}(x_{s},s) from noisy data xssubscript𝑥𝑠x_{s}. The noised data points are produced from a dataset of real images x0subscript𝑥0x_{0} via a forward diffusion process xs=αs​x0+σs​ϵsubscript𝑥𝑠subscript𝛼𝑠subscript𝑥0subscript𝜎𝑠italic-ϵx_{s}=\alpha_{s}x_{0}+\sigma_{s}\epsilon. In our experiments, we use the same coefficients αssubscript𝛼𝑠\alpha_{s} and σssubscript𝜎𝑠\sigma_{s} as the student DM and sample s𝑠s uniformly from a set Tstudent={τ1,…,τn}subscript𝑇studentsubscript𝜏1…subscript𝜏𝑛T_{\mathrm{student}}=\{\tau_{1},...,\tau_{n}\} of N𝑁N chosen student timesteps. In practice, we choose N=4𝑁4N=4. Importantly, we set τn=1000subscript𝜏𝑛1000\tau_{n}=1000 and enforce zero-terminal SNR [33] during training, as the model needs to start from pure noise during inference.
items.zh: 我们的训练过程在图2中概述，涉及三个网络：ADD学生模型从预训练的UNet-DM初始化，权重为θ；一个判别器，可训练权重为φ；以及一个DM教师模型，权重冻结为ψ。在训练期间，ADD学生模型从噪声数据x_s生成样本x̂_θ(x_s, s)。噪声数据点通过前向扩散过程从真实图像数据集x_0产生：x_s = α_s x_0 + σ_s ϵ。在我们的实验中，我们使用与学生DM相同的系数α_s和σ_s，并从一组N个选定的学生时间步T_student = {τ_1, ..., τ_n}中均匀采样s。在实践中，我们选择N=4。重要的是，我们设置τ_n=1000并在训练期间强制执行零终端信噪比[33]，因为模型在推理时需要从纯噪声开始。

items.en: For the adversarial objective, the generated samples x^θsubscript^𝑥𝜃\hat{x}_{\theta} and real images x0subscript𝑥0x_{0} are passed to the discriminator which aims to distinguish between them. The design of the discriminator and the adversarial loss are described in detail in Sec. 3.2. To distill knowledge from the DM teacher, we diffuse student samples x^θsubscript^𝑥𝜃\hat{x}_{\theta} with the teacher’s forward process to x^θ,tsubscript^𝑥𝜃𝑡\hat{x}_{\theta,t}, and use the teacher’s denoising prediction x^ψ​(x^θ,t,t)subscript^𝑥𝜓subscript^𝑥𝜃𝑡𝑡\hat{x}_{\psi}(\hat{x}_{\theta,t},t) as a reconstruction target for the distillation loss ℒdistillsubscriptℒdistill\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{distill}}, see Section 3.3. Thus, the overall objective is
items.zh: 对于对抗目标，生成的样本 x̂_θ 和真实图像 x_0 被传递给判别器，其目标是区分它们。判别器和对抗损失的设计在第 3.2 节中详细描述。为了从 DM 教师中蒸馏知识，我们通过教师的前向过程将学生样本 x̂_θ 扩散到 x̂_{θ,t}，并使用教师的去噪预测 x̂_ψ(x̂_{θ,t}, t) 作为蒸馏损失 L_distill 的重建目标，参见第 3.3 节。因此，总体目标是

items.en: While we formulate our method in pixel space, it is straightforward to adapt it to LDMs operating in latent space. When using LDMs with a shared latent space for teacher and student, the distillation loss can be computed in pixel or latent space. We compute the distillation loss in pixel space as this yields more stable gradients when distilling latent diffusion model [72].
items.zh: 虽然我们在像素空间中制定我们的方法，但可以很容易地将其适应于在潜在空间中运行的 LDM。当使用教师和学生共享潜在空间的 LDM 时，蒸馏损失可以在像素或潜在空间中计算。我们在像素空间中计算蒸馏损失，因为在蒸馏潜在扩散模型 [72] 时，这会产生更稳定的梯度。

items.capEn: Figure 5: User preference study (single step). We compare the performance of ADD-XL (1-step) against established baselines. ADD-XL model outperforms all models, except SDXL in human preference for both image quality and prompt alignment. Using more sampling steps further improves our model (bottom row).
items.capZh: 图 5：用户偏好研究（单步）。我们将 ADD-XL（1 步）的性能与已建立的基线进行比较。ADD-XL 模型在图像质量和提示对齐方面的人类偏好上优于所有模型，除了 SDXL。使用更多采样步骤进一步改进了我们的模型（底行）。

items.en: For the discriminator, we follow the proposed design and training procedure in [59] which we briefly summarize; for details, we refer the reader to the original work. We use a frozen pretrained feature network F𝐹F and a set of trainable lightweight discriminator heads 𝒟ϕ,ksubscript𝒟italic-ϕ𝑘\mathcal{D}_{\phi,k}. For the feature network F𝐹F, Sauer et al. [59] find vision transformers (ViTs) [9] to work well, and we ablate different choice for the ViTs objective and model size in Section 4. The trainable discriminator heads are applied on features Fksubscript𝐹𝑘F_{k} at different layers of the feature network.
items.zh: 对于判别器，我们遵循 [59] 中提出的设计和训练程序，我们简要总结如下；有关详细信息，我们请读者参考原始工作。我们使用一个冻结的预训练特征网络 F 和一组可训练的轻量级判别器头 D_{φ,k}。对于特征网络 F，Sauer 等人 [59] 发现视觉 Transformer (ViT) [9] 效果很好，我们在第 4 节中消融了 ViT 目标和模型大小的不同选择。可训练的判别器头应用于特征网络不同层的特征 F_k。

items.en: To improve performance, the discriminator can be conditioned on additional information via projection [46]. Commonly, a text embedding ctextsubscript𝑐textc_{\mathrm{text}} is used in the text-to-image setting. But, in contrast to standard GAN training, our training configuration also allows to condition on a given image. For τ<1000𝜏1000\tau<1000, the ADD-student receives some signal from the input image x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}. Therefore, for a given generated sample x^θ​(xs,s)subscript^𝑥𝜃subscript𝑥𝑠𝑠\hat{x}_{\theta}(x_{s},s), we can condition the discriminator on information from x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}. This encourages the ADD-student to utilize the input effectively. In practice, we use an additional feature network to extract an image embedding cimgsubscript𝑐imgc_{\mathrm{img}}.
items.zh: 为了提高性能，可以通过投影 [46] 对判别器进行条件化。通常，在文本到图像设置中使用文本嵌入 c_text。但是，与标准 GAN 训练相比，我们的训练配置还允许对给定图像进行条件化。对于 τ < 1000，ADD 学生从输入图像 x_0 接收一些信号。因此，对于给定的生成样本 x̂_θ(x_s, s)，我们可以根据 x_0 的信息对判别器进行条件化。这鼓励 ADD 学生有效利用输入。在实践中，我们使用额外的特征网络来提取图像嵌入 c_img。

items.en: Following [57, 59], we use the hinge loss [32] as the adversarial objective function. Thus the ADD-student’s adversarial objective ℒadv​(x^θ​(xs,s),ϕ)subscriptℒadvsubscript^𝑥𝜃subscript𝑥𝑠𝑠italic-ϕ\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{adv}}(\hat{x}_{\theta}(x_{s},s),\phi) amounts to
items.zh: 遵循 [57, 59]，我们使用铰链损失 [32] 作为对抗目标函数。因此，ADD 学生的对抗目标 L_adv(x̂_θ(x_s, s), φ) 为

items.en: whereas the discriminator is trained to minimize
items.zh: 而判别器被训练以最小化

items.en: where R​1𝑅1R1 denotes the R1 gradient penalty [44]. Rather than computing the gradient penalty with respect to the pixel values, we compute it on the input of each discriminator head 𝒟ϕ,ksubscript𝒟italic-ϕ𝑘\mathcal{D}_{\phi,k}. We find that the R​1𝑅1R1 penalty is particularly beneficial when training at output resolutions larger than 1282superscript1282128^{2} px.
items.zh: 其中 R1 表示 R1 梯度惩罚 [44]。我们不是相对于像素值计算梯度惩罚，而是在每个判别器头 D_{φ,k} 的输入上计算它。我们发现 R1 惩罚在训练输出分辨率大于 128^2 像素时特别有益。

items.en: The distillation loss in Eq. (1) is formulated as
items.zh: 公式 (1) 中的蒸馏损失被表述为

items.en: where sg denotes the stop-gradient operation. Intuitively, the loss uses a distance metric d𝑑d to measure the mismatch between generated samples xθsubscript𝑥𝜃x_{\theta} by the ADD-student and the DM-teacher’s outputs x^ψ​(x^θ,t,t)=(x^θ,t−σt​ϵ^ψ​(x^θ,t,t))/αtsubscript^𝑥𝜓subscript^𝑥𝜃𝑡𝑡subscript^𝑥𝜃𝑡subscript𝜎𝑡subscript^italic-ϵ𝜓subscript^𝑥𝜃𝑡𝑡subscript𝛼𝑡\hat{x}_{\psi}(\hat{x}_{\theta,t},t)=(\hat{x}_{\theta,t}-\sigma_{t}\hat{\epsilon}_{\psi}(\hat{x}_{\theta,t},t))/\alpha_{t} averaged over timesteps t𝑡t and noise ϵ′superscriptitalic-ϵ′\epsilon^{\prime}. Notably, the teacher is not directly applied on generations x^θsubscript^𝑥𝜃\hat{x}_{\theta} of the ADD-student but instead on diffused outputs x^θ,t=αt​x^θ+σt​ϵ′subscript^𝑥𝜃𝑡subscript𝛼𝑡subscript^𝑥𝜃subscript𝜎𝑡superscriptitalic-ϵ′\hat{x}_{\theta,t}=\alpha_{t}\hat{x}_{\theta}+\sigma_{t}\epsilon^{\prime}, as non-diffused inputs would be out-of-distribution for the teacher model [68].
items.zh: 其中 sg 表示停止梯度操作。直观上，该损失使用距离度量 d 来测量 ADD 学生生成的样本 x_θ 与 DM 教师输出 x̂_ψ(x̂_{θ,t}, t) = (x̂_{θ,t} - σ_t ε̂_ψ(x̂_{θ,t}, t)) / α_t 之间的不匹配，该不匹配在时间步 t 和噪声 ε' 上平均。值得注意的是，教师不是直接应用于 ADD 学生的生成 x̂_θ，而是应用于扩散输出 x̂_{θ,t} = α_t x̂_θ + σ_t ε'，因为非扩散输入对于教师模型来说是分布外的 [68]。

items.en: In the following, we define the distance function d​(x,y)≔‖x−y‖22≔𝑑𝑥𝑦superscriptsubscriptnorm𝑥𝑦22d(x,y)\coloneqq||x-y||_{2}^{2}. Regarding the weighting function c​(t)𝑐𝑡c(t), we consider two options: exponential weighting, where c​(t)=αt𝑐𝑡subscript𝛼𝑡c(t)=\alpha_{t} (higher noise levels contribute less), and score distillation sampling (SDS) weighting [51]. In the supplementary material, we demonstrate that with d​(x,y)=‖x−y‖22𝑑𝑥𝑦superscriptsubscriptnorm𝑥𝑦22d(x,y)=||x-y||_{2}^{2} and a specific choice for c​(t)𝑐𝑡c(t), our distillation loss becomes equivalent to the SDS objective ℒSDSsubscriptℒSDS\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{SDS}}, as proposed in [51]. The advantage of our formulation is its ability to enable direct visualization of the reconstruction targets and that it naturally facilitates the execution of several consecutive denoising steps. Lastly, we also evaluate noise-free score distillation (NFSD) objective, a recently proposed variant of SDS [28].
items.zh: 在下文中，我们定义距离函数 d(x, y) := ||x - y||_2^2。关于加权函数 c(t)，我们考虑两个选项：指数加权，其中 c(t) = α_t（较高的噪声水平贡献较小），以及分数蒸馏采样 (SDS) 加权 [51]。在补充材料中，我们证明，使用 d(x, y) = ||x - y||_2^2 和 c(t) 的特定选择，我们的蒸馏损失等价于 [51] 中提出的 SDS 目标 L_SDS。我们公式的优势在于它能够直接可视化重建目标，并且自然地促进了多个连续去噪步骤的执行。最后，我们还评估了无噪声分数蒸馏 (NFSD) 目标，这是 SDS 的一个最近提出的变体 [28]。

items.en: For our experiments, we train two models of different capacities, ADD-M (860M parameters) and ADD-XL (3.1B parameters). For ablating ADD-M, we use a Stable Diffusion (SD) 2.1 backbone [54], and for fair comparisons with other baselines, we use SD1.5. ADD-XL utilizes a SDXL [50] backbone. All experiments are conducted at a standardized resolution of 512x512 pixels; outputs from models generating higher resolutions are down-sampled to this size.
items.zh: 对于我们的实验，我们训练了两个不同容量的模型：ADD-M（8.6 亿参数）和 ADD-XL（31 亿参数）。对于消融 ADD-M，我们使用 Stable Diffusion (SD) 2.1 主干 [54]，为了与其他基线进行公平比较，我们使用 SD1.5。ADD-XL 使用 SDXL [50] 主干。所有实验均在标准化分辨率 512x512 像素下进行；生成更高分辨率的模型的输出被下采样到此大小。

items.en: We employ a distillation weighting factor of λ=2.5𝜆2.5\lambda=2.5 across all experiments. Additionally, the R1 penalty strength γ𝛾\gamma is set to 10−5superscript10510^{-5}. For discriminator conditioning, we use a pretrained CLIP-ViT-g-14 text encoder [52] to compute text embeddings ctextsubscript𝑐textc_{\mathrm{text}} and the CLS embedding of a DINOv2 ViT-L encoder [47] for image embeddings cimgsubscript𝑐imgc_{\mathrm{img}}. For the baselines, we use the best publicly available models: Latent diffusion models [54, 50] (SD1.5111https://github.com/CompVis/stable-diffusion, SDXL222https://github.com/Stability-AI/generative-models) cascaded pixel diffusion models [55] (IF-XL333https://github.com/deep-floyd/IF), distilled diffusion models [39, 41] (LCM-1.5, LCM-1.5-XL444https://huggingface.co/latent-consistency/lcm-lora-sdxl), and OpenMUSE 555https://huggingface.co/openMUSE [48], a reimplementation of MUSE [6], a transformer model specifically developed for fast inference. Note that we compare to the SDXL-Base-1.0 model without its additional refiner model; this is to ensure a fair comparison. As there are no public state-of-the-art GAN models, we retrain StyleGAN-T [59] with our improved discriminator. This baseline (StyleGAN-T++) significantly outperforms the previous best GANs in FID and CS, see supplementary. We quantify sample quality via FID [18] and text alignment via CLIP score [17]. For CLIP score, we use ViT-g-14 model trained on LAION-2B [61]. Both metrics are evaluated on 5k samples from COCO2017 [34].
items.zh: 我们在所有实验中使用蒸馏加权因子 λ = 2.5。此外，R1 惩罚强度 γ 设置为 10^{-5}。对于判别器条件化，我们使用预训练的 CLIP-ViT-g-14 文本编码器 [52] 来计算文本嵌入 c_text，以及 DINOv2 ViT-L 编码器 [47] 的 CLS 嵌入用于图像嵌入 c_img。对于基线，我们使用最好的公开可用模型：潜在扩散模型 [54, 50] (SD1.5, SDXL)、级联像素扩散模型 [55] (IF-XL)、蒸馏扩散模型 [39, 41] (LCM-1.5, LCM-1.5-XL) 和 OpenMUSE [48]，这是 MUSE [6] 的重新实现，一个专门为快速推理开发的 Transformer 模型。请注意，我们与 SDXL-Base-1.0 模型进行比较，没有使用其额外的精炼器模型；这是为了确保公平比较。由于没有公开的最先进的 GAN 模型，我们使用改进的判别器重新训练了 StyleGAN-T [59]。这个基线 (StyleGAN-T++) 在 FID 和 CS 上显著优于之前最好的 GAN，见补充材料。我们通过 FID [18] 量化样本质量，通过 CLIP 分数 [17] 量化文本对齐。对于 CLIP 分数，我们使用在 LAION-2B [61] 上训练的 ViT-g-14 模型。两个指标均在 COCO2017 [34] 的 5k 样本上评估。

items.en: Our training setup opens up a number of design spaces regarding the adversarial loss, distillation loss, initialization, and loss interplay. We conduct an ablation study on several choices in Table 1; key insights are highlighted below each table. We will discuss each experiment in the following.
items.zh: 我们的训练设置开辟了许多关于对抗损失、蒸馏损失、初始化和损失相互作用的设计空间。我们在表 1 中对几个选择进行了消融研究；关键见解在每个表下方突出显示。我们将在下面讨论每个实验。

items.en: Discriminator feature networks. (Table LABEL:tab:abl0). Recent insights by Stein et al. [67] suggest that ViTs trained with the CLIP [52] or DINO [5, 47] objectives are particularly well-suited for evaluating the performance of generative models. Similarly, these models also seem effective as discriminator feature networks, with DINOv2 emerging as the best choice.
items.zh: 判别器特征网络。（表 LABEL:tab:abl0）。Stein 等人 [67] 的最新见解表明，使用 CLIP [52] 或 DINO [5, 47] 目标训练的 ViT 特别适合评估生成模型的性能。类似地，这些模型作为判别器特征网络似乎也有效，其中 DINOv2 成为最佳选择。

items.en: Discriminator conditioning. (Table LABEL:tab:abl1). Similar to prior studies, we observe that text conditioning of the discriminator enhances results. Notably, image conditioning outperforms text conditioning, and the combination of both ctextsubscript𝑐textc_{\mathrm{text}} and cimgsubscript𝑐imgc_{\mathrm{img}} yields the best results.
items.zh: 判别器条件化。（表 LABEL:tab:abl1）。与先前的研究类似，我们观察到判别器的文本条件化增强了结果。值得注意的是，图像条件化优于文本条件化，并且 c_text 和 c_img 的组合产生了最佳结果。

items.en: Student pretraining. (Table LABEL:tab:abl2). Our experiments demonstrate the importance of pretraining the ADD-student. Being able to use pretrained generators is a significant advantage over pure GAN approaches. A problem of GANs is the lack of scalability; both Sauer et al. [59] and Kang et al. [25] observe a saturation of performance after a certain network capacity is reached. This observation contrasts the generally smooth scaling laws of DMs [49]. However, ADD can effectively leverage larger pretrained DMs (see Table LABEL:tab:abl2) and benefit from stable DM pretraining.
items.zh: 学生预训练。（表 LABEL:tab:abl2）。我们的实验证明了预训练 ADD 学生的重要性。能够使用预训练生成器是相对于纯 GAN 方法的显著优势。GAN 的一个问题是缺乏可扩展性；Sauer 等人 [59] 和 Kang 等人 [25] 都观察到在达到一定网络容量后性能饱和。这一观察结果与 DM 通常平滑的缩放定律 [49] 形成对比。然而，ADD 可以有效地利用更大的预训练 DM（见表 LABEL:tab:abl2）并受益于稳定的 DM 预训练。

items.en: Loss terms. (Table LABEL:tab:abl3). We find that both losses are essential. The distillation loss on its own is not effective, but when combined with the adversarial loss, there is a noticeable improvement in results. Different weighting schedules lead to different behaviours, the exponential schedule tends to yield more diverse samples, as indicated by lower FID, SDS and NFSD schedules improve quality and text alignment. While we use the exponential schedule as the default setting in all other ablations, we opt for the NFSD weighting for training our final model. Choosing an optimal weighting function presents an opportunity for improvement. Alternatively, scheduling the distillation weights over training, as explored in the 3D generative modeling literature [23] could be considered.
items.zh: 损失项。（表 LABEL:tab:abl3）。我们发现两个损失都是必不可少的。蒸馏损失本身并不有效，但当与对抗损失结合时，结果有显著改善。不同的加权方案导致不同的行为，指数方案倾向于产生更多样化的样本，如较低的 FID 所示，SDS 和 NFSD 方案提高了质量和文本对齐。虽然我们在所有其他消融中使用指数方案作为默认设置，但我们选择 NFSD 加权来训练我们的最终模型。选择最优的加权函数提供了改进的机会。或者，可以考虑在训练过程中调度蒸馏权重，如 3D 生成建模文献 [23] 中所探索的。

items.capEn: Figure 6: User preference study (multiple steps). We compare the performance of ADD-XL (4-step) against established baselines. Our ADD-XL model outperforms all models, including its teacher SDXL 1.0 (base, no refiner) [50], in human preference for both image quality and prompt alignment.
items.capZh: 图 6：用户偏好研究（多步）。我们将 ADD-XL（4 步）的性能与已建立的基线进行比较。我们的 ADD-XL 模型在图像质量和提示对齐方面的人类偏好上优于所有模型，包括其教师 SDXL 1.0（基础版，无精炼器）[50]。

items.en: Teacher type. (Table LABEL:tab:abl4). Interestingly, a bigger student and teacher does not necessarily result in better FID and CS. Rather, the student adopts the teachers characteristics. SDXL obtains generally higher FID, possibly because of its less diverse output, yet it exhibits higher image quality and text alignment [50].
items.zh: 教师类型。（表 LABEL:tab:abl4）。有趣的是，更大的学生和教师并不一定导致更好的 FID 和 CS。相反，学生继承了教师的特征。SDXL 通常获得更高的 FID，可能是因为其输出多样性较低，但它表现出更高的图像质量和文本对齐 [50]。

items.en: Teacher steps. (Table LABEL:tab:abl5). While our distillation loss formulation allows taking several consecutive steps with the teacher by construction, we find that several steps do not conclusively result in better performance.
items.zh: 教师步骤。（表 LABEL:tab:abl5）。虽然我们的蒸馏损失公式允许通过构造与教师连续进行多个步骤，但我们发现多个步骤并未最终带来更好的性能。

full.secZh: 4.2 与最新技术的定量比较

items.en: For our main comparison with other approaches, we refrain from using automated metrics, as user preference studies are more reliable [50]. In the study, we aim to assess both prompt adherence and the overall image. As a performance measure, we compute win percentages for pairwise comparisons and ELO scores when comparing several approaches. For the reported ELO scores we calculate the mean scores between both prompt following and image quality. Details on the ELO score computation and the study parameters are listed in the supplementary material.
items.zh: 为了与其他方法进行主要比较，我们避免使用自动指标，因为用户偏好研究更可靠[50]。在该研究中，我们旨在评估提示遵循度和整体图像。作为性能度量，我们计算成对比较的胜率和比较多种方法时的ELO分数。对于报告的ELO分数，我们计算提示遵循度和图像质量之间的平均分数。ELO分数计算和研究参数的详细信息列在补充材料中。

items.en: Fig. 5 and Fig. 6 present the study results. The most important results are: First, ADD-XL outperforms LCM-XL (4 steps) with a single step. Second, ADD-XL can beat SDXL (50 steps) with four steps in the majority of comparisons. This makes ADD-XL the state-of-the-art in both the single and the multiple steps setting. Fig. 7 visualizes ELO scores relative to inference speed. Lastly, Table 2 compares different few-step sampling and distillation methods using the same base model. ADD outperforms all other approaches including the standard DPM solver with eight steps.
items.zh: 图5和图6展示了研究结果。最重要的结果是：首先，ADD-XL在单步中优于LCM-XL（4步）。其次，ADD-XL在大多数比较中可以用四步击败SDXL（50步）。这使得ADD-XL在单步和多步设置中都达到了最先进水平。图7展示了相对于推理速度的ELO分数。最后，表2比较了使用相同基础模型的不同少步采样和蒸馏方法。ADD优于所有其他方法，包括使用八步的标准DPM求解器。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Qualitative comparison to the teacher model. ADD-XL can outperform its teacher model SDXL in the multi-step setting. The adversarial loss boosts realism, particularly enhancing textures (fur, fabric, skin) while reducing oversmoothing, commonly observed in diffusion model samples. ADD-XL’s overall sample diversity tends to be lower.
items.capZh: 图8：与教师模型的定性比较。ADD-XL在多步设置中可以超越其教师模型SDXL。对抗损失提升了真实感，特别增强了纹理（毛皮、织物、皮肤），同时减少了扩散模型样本中常见的过度平滑。ADD-XL的整体样本多样性往往较低。

items.en: To complement our quantitative studies above, we present qualitative results in this section. To paint a more complete picture, we provide additional samples and qualitative comparisons in the supplementary material. Fig. 3 compares ADD-XL (1 step) against the best current baselines in the few-steps regime. Fig. 4 illustrates the iterative sampling process of ADD-XL. These results showcase our model’s ability to improve upon an initial sample. Such iterative improvement represents another significant benefit over pure GAN approaches like StyleGAN-T++. Lastly, Fig. 8 compares ADD-XL directly with its teacher model SDXL-Base. As indicated by the user studies in Section 4.2, ADD-XL outperforms its teacher in both quality and prompt alignment. The enhanced realism comes at the cost of slightly decreased sample diversity.
items.zh: 为了补充上述定量研究，我们在本节中展示定性结果。为了更全面地描绘，我们在补充材料中提供了额外的样本和定性比较。图3比较了ADD-XL（1步）与当前少步数领域的最佳基线。图4展示了ADD-XL的迭代采样过程。这些结果展示了我们的模型改进初始样本的能力。这种迭代改进代表了相对于纯GAN方法（如StyleGAN-T++）的另一个显著优势。最后，图8直接将ADD-XL与其教师模型SDXL-Base进行比较。如第4.2节的用户研究所指出的，ADD-XL在质量和提示对齐方面均优于其教师。增强的真实感以略微降低的样本多样性为代价。

items.en: This work introduces Adversarial Diffusion Distillation, a general method for distilling a pretrained diffusion model into a fast, few-step image generation model. We combine an adversarial and a score distillation objective to distill the public Stable Diffusion [54] and SDXL [50] models, leveraging both real data through the discriminator and structural understanding through the diffusion teacher. Our approach performs particularly well in the ultra-fast sampling regime of one or two steps, and our analyses demonstrate that it outperforms all concurrent methods in this regime. Furthermore, we retain the ability to refine samples using multiple steps. In fact, using four sampling steps, our model outperforms widely used multi-step generators such as SDXL, IF, and OpenMUSE.
items.zh: 本文介绍了对抗性扩散蒸馏，一种将预训练扩散模型蒸馏为快速、少步图像生成模型的通用方法。我们结合对抗性和分数蒸馏目标来蒸馏公开的Stable Diffusion [54]和SDXL [50]模型，通过判别器利用真实数据，通过扩散教师利用结构理解。我们的方法在一步或两步的超快采样场景中表现尤为出色，我们的分析表明它在该场景中优于所有并发方法。此外，我们保留了使用多个步骤细化样本的能力。实际上，使用四个采样步骤，我们的模型优于广泛使用的多步生成器，如SDXL、IF和OpenMUSE。

items.en: Our model enables the generation of high quality images in a single-step, opening up new possibilities for real-time generation with foundation models.
items.zh: 我们的模型能够在单步中生成高质量图像，为基础模型实时生成开辟了新的可能性。

items.en: We would like to thank Jonas Müller for feedback on the draft, the proof, and typesetting; Patrick Esser for feedback on the proof and building an early model demo; Frederic Boesel for generating data and helpful discussions; Minguk Kang and Taesung Park for providing GigaGAN samples; Richard Vencu, Harry Saini, and Sami Kama for maintaining the compute infrastructure; Yara Wald for creative sampling support; and Vanessa Sauer for her general support.
items.zh: 我们要感谢Jonas Müller对草稿、校样和排版的反馈；Patrick Esser对校样的反馈以及构建早期模型演示；Frederic Boesel生成数据和进行有益讨论；Minguk Kang和Taesung Park提供GigaGAN样本；Richard Vencu、Harry Saini和Sami Kama维护计算基础设施；Yara Wald提供创意采样支持；以及Vanessa Sauer的一般支持。
